title: Shareable links
body: Step 1 can now be pre-filled from a URL, so other sites can link straight into a result instead of a blank form.

title: Smarter clustering
body: Repeaters heard through a relay (2nd-hop) are now included based on real network links where available, not just a flat guessed range.

title: Duplicate-node fix
body: Switching between duplicate nodes for the same prefix no longer silently resets the weight you'd set.

title: New top bar
body: Added a Dutch MeshCore-branded top bar with links to the community site, Mesh-Hunter, MC-Radar, and this project's GitHub.

title: Tighter default search radius
body: Cluster search radius now defaults to 6km instead of 50km, matching typical real-world repeater density.

title: Docker deploy
body: One-command deploy via Docker Compose with a built-in Cloudflare Tunnel sidecar.
